<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR. -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## How to test
<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Capsule/dashboard UI still renders (if UI was touched)

## Notes
<!-- Screenshots for UI changes, follow-ups, or anything reviewers should know. -->
